# Guest Creation Flags

**API Collection**

Use these supplemental flags to create a guest object.

## Overview

These flags supplement the flags described in [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecCSFlags]. Use these additional constants with the flags parameter of the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecHostCreateGuest] function.

## Constants

- **kSecCSDedicatedHost**: Declares dedicated hosting for the given host.
- **kSecCSGenerateGuestHash**: Ask the host to generate the unique binary identifier ([doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecCodeInfoUnique]) from the copy on disk at the path given.
